text: Can we make the button more... pop? Not sure how, just more.
The launch campaign is going viral! Well, one person liked it, but still.
We need this rebranded by end of day, no pressure.
Can engineering just add a blockchain element to the landing page?
Our competitor just launched the same feature, we need it yesterday.
Sent the newsletter to the wrong list again, no one noticed though.

messages.text: I was just watching a TikTok on the subway. Are we doing anything with Generative AI? We need a "Powered by AI" banner on the landing page by Friday. Doesn't need to do anything, just glow and look cool.
Love this. Glowing AI banner. Very now.
Just to clarify, you want a badge that says AI but isn't connected to any AI?
Connected to AI is a Q3 problem. Glowing is a Friday problem.
Can we make it glow harder than the competitor's banner? I feel like theirs glows more.
Ooh, and can it say "AI" but like, shimmer? Shimmer reads as smarter.
Shimmer reads as smarter. Got it. I'll get the team right on it.
